title: goodenia crenata
intro: Goodenia crenata, also known as the rough leaf goodenia, is a perennial herb native to Australia, belonging to the Goodeniaceae family. It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as aiding in wound healing, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Goodenia crenata is often used in tea or infused in oil to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional remedies for treating various ailments.
